title: Four years of war in Ukraine: Odesa's complex 'derussification'
subhead: The southern Ukrainian city, long under the influence of Russia and then the Soviet Union due to its access to the Black Sea, is continuing the process of dismantling the pro-Russian narrative and reclaiming the city, much to the chagrin of those who wish to preserve its Russian 'cultural heritage.'

The political stakes of organized crime in Israel
subhead: The wave of criminal violence targeting Israel's Arab minority puts Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu's government squarely on the spot, argues historian Jean-Pierre Filiu in his column.

title: EU plunged into uncertainty over US trade deal
subhead: The European Parliament suspended the ratification of the Turnberry agreement on Monday after the US Supreme Court struck down tariffs imposed by the Trump administration. But European imports now face a new tax introduced by the American president.

title: London Fashion Week: A season of reinvention
subhead: From Burberry's urban glamour to Simone Rocha's sportswear revival, fashion houses have revamped their appeal for the fall/winter 2026-2027 collections, presented from February 19 to 23 in the British capital.

title: 2030 Alps Games: Around 40 projects remain to be completed as the deadline nears and timelines tighten
subhead: With four years to go before the Winter Olympic and Paralympic Games open in France, and just three and a half years before the expected delivery of construction projects, consultations with developers are ongoing.

The Ukrainian family torn by war and exile behind a famous photo published by Le Monde
subhead: A few days after the Russian invasion, photojournalist Laurence Geai captured the farewell of a Ukrainian family at Odesa train station. Four years later, the mother welcomed Le Monde to Cologne, Germany, where she lives as a refugee with her son and her mother, far from her husband, since enlisted in the army.

title: The 'impossible' task of counting deaths at sea
subhead: The International Organization for Migration and migrant aid NGOs simultaneously record deaths at sea in the Mediterranean and Atlantic, but often come up with very different figures. Why?

title: Dark Bank: American suspected of leading an international criminal organization extradited to France
subhead: Huzefa Hafiz Ismail arrived on French soil on Friday. He was arrested in August 2024 in Texas at the request of French judicial authorities, who suspect him of leading a vast money laundering network.
